title: SKILL.md Frontmatter Schema
description: Required and optional fields in a skill's SKILL.md frontmatter. Enforced in S2 by install.sh validator.

name.description: Kebab-case skill identifier. Lowercase. Hyphens allowed. No spaces/underscores.

domain.description: Top-level routing domain. Determines which anchor surfaces the skill.

version.description: Semver version string (e.g., 0.1.0). Bump on every material change.

role.description: Human-readable job title (real-life role naming convention, per principle_real_life_role_naming).

description.description: Free-form trigger description. Must include: what the skill does, trigger phrases, and NOT-for clauses listing 2+ sibling skills to avoid collision.

capabilities.description: SNES-cartridge contract. Required in S2 (v0.2+ schema).

reads.description: File paths or patterns this skill may read.

writes.description: File paths or patterns this skill may write (should be within own data folder).

calls.description: Other skills or tools this skill may invoke.

cannot.description: Explicit prohibitions (e.g., 'modify other skills', 'bypass anchor routing').

_enforcement_notes.s1: Only name, domain, description are enforced at install time.
_enforcement_notes.s2: capabilities block becomes REQUIRED. install.sh runs this schema check before symlinking.
_enforcement_notes.s3: schema_version field added to all data files for forward-compat migrations.
